title: Patti Thompson
compiled_truth: Patti Thompson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-11-14), Patti Thompson sent 197 and received 671 emails, totalling 868 interactions. Top correspondents: [Leslie Reeves](people/leslie-reeves) (44), [Brent Price](people/brent-price) (35), [Brenda Herod](people/brenda-herod) (34), [Bob Hall](people/bob-hall) (33), [Shona Wilson](people/shona-wilson) (31). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, calendar, deleted_items, inbox, sent.
